title: ATOBA, easyJet, and World Fuel sign a Memorandum of Understanding to Develop Long Term Supply of Sustainable Aviation Fuel
content: easyJet and ATOBA Energy (ATOBA), in partnership with World Fuel Services (World Fuel) have announced the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding for the development of long-term supply of Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) for easyJetâ€™s operations in Europe and the UK. The agreement supports the airlineâ€™s decarbonisation strategy and is expected to unlock the SAF value chain through the combination of ATOBAâ€™s SAF aggregation, enabling management of pricing and supply volatility risk for airlines and will be further enhanced by World Fuelâ€™s global jet fuel logistics, blending, storage and distribution infrastructure.
author: Analysts Account
